verses.text: Topa aw, David na ngaihsutna-in a gim thuaknate khempeuh leh amah in, “Jakob' Vanglianpa' tenna ding, Topa-a' ding mun ka muh matengin ka inn sungah ka lum kei ding a, ka lupna ka zuan kei ding hi. Ka ihmu kei ding a, ka mitkhute ka kikhupsak kei ding hi,” ci-in Jakob' Vanglianpa' tungah hong thuciamna leh Topa' tungah hong kiciamnate phawk in
Jaar gamsungah Thuciamna Singkuang ka mu uh hi, cihna thuthak Bethlehem-ah kiza hi
“Ama omna munah va pai ni; ama khengakna-ah va bia ni,” ka ci uh hi
Topa aw, tho in la na vangliatna lim Thuciamna Singkuang tawh na omna munah pai in
Na mite na hotkhiatna thu, na siampite in taangko hen la, na mi siangthote lungdamin awng ta uh hen
Na nasempa David tungah thu na ciamzo hi; na sathau nilhpa nial kei in
Topa in a pelhloh ding kiciamna taktak khat David tungah kiciam a, “Nang' sung pana na tate khat na kumpi tokhom tungah ka koih ding hi
Na tate in, amau' tungah ka hilh ding ka thuciamna leh ka teci pan'nate a zuih nak uh leh, amau' tate zong na kumpi tokhom tungah tu paisuak ding uh hi,” na ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in Zion teel khinzo a, amah in tua mun pen ama ten'na dingin a deih hi
“Hih mun pen ka om tawntungna ding ahi hi; hih mun deih ka hih manin hih lai-ah ka teng ding hi
Ama beemlepang thupha tampi ka pia ding a, a mizawngte an ka vak kham ding hi
Ka hotkhiatna thu, a siampite ka taangkosak ding a, a mi siangthote lungdamin la sa-in awng ding uh hi
Keimah in tua lai-ah David' suanlekhakte kumpi lianin ka koih ding a, ka sathau nilhpa' ukna ka kipsak ding hi
Ama galte maizumna tawh ka dimsak ding a, ahih hangin ama kumpi gam khangin zai semsem ding hi,” na ci hi.
